title: YTPC Reports (YTP News) - In Case You Missed It: YouChewPoop gets "hacked"
description:
Today, YTPC and it's news "division" have unveiled new on-screen graphics and music.
Also, Our friends at YCP faced some technical problems on July 3rd and  they say it was caused by Hulk Hogan.
